prompt: Apply the second image's 2D visualization pie chart style to the first image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Convert the pie chart into a doughnut chart using the visual style of image 2. Apply the dark, glossy teal color palette, white segment outlines, and a dark background from image 2 to the chart in image 1. Ensure the percentage labels are white and positioned outside the segments.
objects: Dark, glossy teal color palette for chart segments
